title: Lift Breakdown with Trapped Passengers
description: Lift B3 in Terminal 2 has stopped between floors with passengers inside. The alarm button is being pressed.

event.details: Lift alarm activated — lift B3L1 stationary between floors, alarm button pressed
Passengers inside lift requesting assistance — 3 adults, one appears anxious

optimal_response.primary_action: dispatch officer to T2_LIFT_B3 and contact CAG Facilities Management ext 3000
optimal_response.secondary_action: communicate with trapped passengers via intercom — reassure and advise to stay calm
optimal_response.do_not: Do not attempt to force open lift doors without technician authorization
optimal_response.escalation: If passenger has medical emergency inside lift, escalate to Level 3 and call Airport Medical Services
